description.en: Curse the target with a rotting weakness that eats away at them over time.
description.cs: Prokleje cíl shnilou slabostí, která ho postupně oslabuje.

to_target.self: you whisper a dark word and a sickly grey shimmer settles over {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} whispers a dark word and a sickly grey shimmer settles over {target}.

to_target.self: zašeptáš temné slovo a nezdravý šedý třpyt se usadí na {target}.
to_target.others: {actor} zašeptá temné slovo a nezdravý šedý třpyt se usadí na {target}.
